title: Iterable objects should return an iterator
description: Ensures iterable objects return an iterator instead of an iterable object.
message: Iterable object should return an iterator.
recommendation: Return an iterator from your iterable object.

noncompliant.description: Returns a list instead of an iterator.

why_is_this_an_issue: Iterators are expected to consume their elements once. Returning a list or other iterable object can lead to unexpected performance issues.
how_to_fix: Ensure your __iter__ method returns an iterator instead of an iterable object.

metadata.title: Iterable objects should return an iterator
